steps.title: Simplify
steps.content: Compute the quotient: $x=8.6$. The answer is 8.6.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $8.6$. Dividing both sides of the given equation by $10$ yields $x=8.6$. Therefore, $8.6$ is the solution to the given equation. Note that 8.6 and 43/5 are examples of ways to enter a correct answer.
